do_not_claim: Paradox-grade HRE microborders or French appanage completeness
legal 1444 frontiers — hints are illustrative for the historical sniff test

priority_region.label: Western Europe
priority_region.notes: M15 priority region. Outside these modern ISO parents, scaffold geometry is retained.

source_notes: Curator-authored soft frontier bands and sample hard overrides for M15 priority-region proof.
Not derived from proprietary game maps. Not a full OpenHistoricalMap extract.
Hard overrides target beta sample province_ids (sample_*); they skip cleanly on full Natural Earth builds.
Soft boundary hints are geographic and apply on any scaffold that intersects the priority region.
